history.text: Administrated under the French Congo appears in Gabon's historical record.
Re-established as French Gabon under the administration of French Equatorial Africa.
A republic was declared, changing Gabon's political system and state identity.
Gabon was granted independence, completing the formal transition to sovereign statehood.
